task_summaries.task_scope: Verify stability of strong linear dependencies among packet and flag features across different temporal segments and attack phases within evidence refs e13-e22.
Distinguish whether observed linear dependencies among packet and flag features arise from inherent protocol constraints or dataset-specific artifacts using evidence refs e13-e22.
Assess impact of removing redundant packet and flag features on information retention and robustness within evidence refs e13-e22, preserving correlated feature scope.
